indicators.name: bar stools
indicators.rationale: Bar stools are not suitable for sleeping, as they lack backrests and are too low to the ground.

indicators.name: high bar counter
indicators.rationale: The high bar counter obstructs access to the sleeping area and creates a barrier between the sleeping and sitting areas.

indicators.name: no bed or sleeping furniture
indicators.rationale: There is no bed or other sleeping furniture present, making it impossible to sleep in this space.

indicators.name: no windows or curtains
indicators.rationale: No windows or curtains would make it difficult to control light levels and maintain privacy.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not suitable for sleep (primary). There are no beds or sleeping furniture, and the high bar counter obstructs access to the sleeping area. The absence of windows or curtains makes it difficult to control light levels and maintain privacy, further reducing the suitability for sleep.
